news.headline: France’s President Macron: It would be difficult to create a European army.
Former Gunvor executive found guilty of paying bribes to secure oil contracts in Africa.
Stock market plunges: Dow Jones drops 570 points due to Walmart news; Nasdaq goes below 20,000, but Alibaba rises.
news.summary: Today, market sellers dominated as Walmart's stock took a hit due to a weaker profit forecast. The Dow Jones plummeted by 570 points in response to this news. Additionally, the Nasdaq dropped below the 20,000 mark. However, amidst this downturn, Alibaba's stock showed resilience and saw a rally. The day's market performance was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Resorts World Las Vegas appoints Carlos Castro as COO & CFO. Castro to lead financial strategy of resort.
news.summary: Resorts World Las Vegas recently named Carlos Castro as its Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer. With this appointment, Castro will take charge of the financial strategy and operations of the resort. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025. For further details and a high-resolution photo, click on the provided link.

news.headline: New VR app Realize Music offers catalog of songs to sing along to, from pop, hip-hop, rock to country. Aims to promote solo singing as self-care practice.
news.summary: A revolutionary VR application has been launched, offering a diverse collection of popular songs across genres such as pop, hip-hop, rock, and country. Users can engage in solo singing sessions with music from current top artists to iconic legends, catering to a wide array of musical tastes. This app aims to promote self-care through singing activities, providing a unique and immersive experience. With an extensive selection of songs, users can enjoy a personalized and therapeutic singing journey.

news.headline: FedPoint joins MSEP program by DoD, aims to support military spouses in job market. CEO Kevin Hill emphasizes family sacrifice.
news.summary: Portsmouth, New Hampshire - FedPoint, a federal benefits administrator and marketplace operator, recently became a part of the Military Spouse Employment Partnership Program (MSEP) overseen by the US Department of Defense (DoD). The induction for new partners took place in Arlington, Virginia. "For military spouses, in particular, this program is crucial as it recognizes the sacrifices and commitment to service made not only by the individuals in uniform but also by their families," mentioned FedPoint CEO Kevin Hill during the event. This move signifies FedPoint's dedication to supporting military families and providing opportunities for employment.

news.headline: Linda Rouse O’Neill joins Applied Policy as VP of Health Policy specializing in medical devices with over 30 years of experience in government affairs and healthcare policy. Formerly at Health Industry Distributor with 14 years.
news.summary: A company based in Alexandria, Virginia named Applied Policy has recently named Linda Rouse O’Neill as their Vice President of Health Policy, with a focus on medical device coverage, coding, and reimbursement. O’Neill, who boasts over 30 years of experience in government affairs and healthcare policy, brings a wealth of knowledge on regulatory and legislative matters impacting the healthcare industry. Prior to her new role at Applied Policy, she dedicated 14 years to the Health Industry Distributor sector.

news.headline: DDN introduces Infinia 2.0 AI Data Intelligence Platform for Enterprises, boasting up to 100X acceleration in AI data.
news.summary: In Chatsworth, California, DDN unveiled DDN Infinia 2.0, a software data platform designed for AI data intelligence. This new platform offers global AI data unification across data centers and multi-cloud environments. Infinia 2.0 is built on a scalable architecture and aims to address key challenges in AI data analytics, model training, and inference. It also enhances GPU efficiency while reducing power consumption. Independent benchmark tests have shown potential for up to a 100-fold improvement in AI data acceleration.

news.headline: Trump's order giving expanded authority over agencies could impact central bank's oversight, causing concern.
news.summary: A directive has been issued to increase supervision over the central bank's regulatory and supervisory duties, causing concern among officials. This directive aims to enhance oversight and accountability in managing the bank's regulatory and supervisory functions. The move comes amid growing calls for increased transparency and efficiency in overseeing the central bank's operations. This directive is expected to impact approximately [provide specific number] staff members involved in regulatory and supervisory roles within the central bank.

news.headline: US 30 Yr TIPS Auction
Rutgers-Newark unveils new mascot, a fox named Scarlet Raider, and launches student-designed spirit apparel line.
news.summary: Yesterday, Rutgers University-Newark introduced their new mascot, the Scarlet Raider, which is a fox. This unveiling event took place in Newark, N.J. on Feb. 20, 2025. In addition to the mascot reveal, a selection of Raider-branded apparel designed by students was showcased. This initiative highlights the collaborative effort among students in creating the brand's visual identity.

news.headline: bswift launches new employee engagement ecosystem due to lowest level engagement in a decade at 31% in 2024 as per Gallup.
news.summary: In February 20, 2025, a report revealed that U.S. employers are facing a significant decline in employee engagement, hitting a record low of 31% in 2024 according to Gallup. To address this issue, bswift®, a prominent company in benefits technology and administration, has taken steps to enhance its engagement ecosystem.

news.headline: Alkami Co:lab 2025 event to have six tracks, 40+ speakers, CTP credits, actionable strategies for financial institutions.
news.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), based in Plano, Texas, will be hosting an agenda featuring discussions led by more than 40 experts on February 20, 2025. This event will offer CTP credits and provide actionable strategies tailored for financial institutions. Alkami is recognized as a top provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions.

news.headline: Sharp Celerity™ High-Speed Oven showcased at the Kitchen & Bath Industry Show by SHCA; Celebrity Chef Boswell demonstrates cooking.
news.summary: At booth W2457 in Montvale, N.J., on February 20, 2025, Celebrity Chef Stephanie Boswell dazzled the audience with a high-speed cooking demonstration. The event was hosted by Sharp Home Electronics Company of America (SHCA), known for its cutting-edge kitchen appliances. These appliances, equipped with smart and distinctive features, were highlighted during the showcase. The event drew attention to the range of innovative products offered by SHCA, attracting a significant crowd to witness the capabilities of these advanced kitchen tools.

news.headline: Therap Services launches new Service Authorization Dashboard in Billing Module for LTC, HCBS, and human services industries.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Torrington, Connecticut, Therap Services, a top provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and similar human services sectors, announced...

news.headline: CEO Sentiment study results for 2025 released by Chief Executives Council in Chicago; includes CEO Financial Performance Index.
news.summary: Announcement: CEO Financial Performance Index for 2025 Now Released CHICAGO - On February 20, 2025, the Chief Executives Council unveiled the findings of a comprehensive study regarding CEO Sentiment for the current year. The report, which has been published, delves into key insights showcasing the annual calculation of the CEO Financial Performance Index™ (FPI). This index serves as a benchmark to gauge the financial health and performance of CEOs, providing valuable data on their collective sentiment and performance.

news.headline: The Coca-Cola Company raises dividend by 5.2% to 51 cents per share annually, totaling $2.04, paying out $8.4 billion in dividends.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of The Coca-Cola Company has announced its 63rd consecutive annual dividend increase, with the quarterly dividend seeing a 5.2% rise from 48.5 cents to 51 cents per common share. This increment brings the annual dividend to $2.04 per share, up from $1.94 per share in the previous year. The first quarter dividend will be payable on April 1 to shareowners of record as of March 14. In total, the company returned $8.4 billion in dividends to shareholders.

news.headline: Geotab ranked #1 global commercial telematics vendor for 4th year in a row. Leader in implementation and innovation.
news.summary: Geotab Inc., a leading player in the connected transportation industry, has been acknowledged as the top commercial telematics vendor globally on February 20, 2025. The company, headquartered in Oakville, ON, has also gained recognition for its outstanding implementation and innovation efforts. This achievement solidifies Geotab's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Edustaff partners with Carson City School District to provide substitute staffing services, enhancing K-12 education.
news.summary: In Carson City, Nevada on February 20, 2025, Edustaff, a prominent provider of K-12 substitute staffing solutions, revealed a recent alliance with the Carson City School District. In this partnership, Edustaff will be responsible for overseeing all substitute staffing requirements for the district.

YouTube to launch cheaper ad-free version of paid video tier, according to sources. #YouTube #adfree #subscription
Cardano (ADA) price surges as constitution ratification raises confidence, with increased TVL and network activity.
news.summary: The price of ADA has surged following the ratification of a Cardano constitution, resulting in a substantial increase in total value locked (TVL) and heightened network activity. This significant development has instilled greater confidence among traders, leading to positive market momentum.

news.headline: French President Macron: We are not planning to send troops to Ukraine.
Technogym launches Healthness at the 25th Wellness Congress in Cesena, Italy, impacting 2,000 individuals from 100 countries.
news.summary: During the 25th Wellness Congress held in Cesena, Italy, Nerio Alessandri introduced Healthness to 2,000 attendees from 100 nations. This new vision aims to transform the landscape of wellness and prevention. The event took place on February 20, 2025, with 40 years of history in the industry guiding this groundbreaking initiative.

news.headline: Swaps trading goes fully electronic, marking a significant shift in the market with increasing numbers adopting the trend.
VALE reports Q4 earnings with revenues declining to $10.124 billion, iron ore shipments down by 9.1 Mt Y/Y, and EBITDA declining 40% Y/Y to $4.1 billion; shares surge.
news.summary: Vale SA's (NYSE:VALE) stock price surged as the company reported a 22% year-over-year decrease in net operating revenues to $10.124 billion, which surpassed the expected $10.117 billion. Iron ore shipments dropped by 9.1 million tonnes YoY due to prioritizing higher-margin products. The average realized price for iron ore fines fell by 21% YoY to $93 per ton due to reduced benchmark prices. Copper and nickel all-in costs were recorded at $1,098 per ton and $13,881 per ton, marking the lowest since Q4 2020 for copper and Q1 2022 for nickel. Proforma EBITDA saw a 40% YoY decrease to $4.1 billion in the quarter due to lower iron ore prices and sales volumes. The adjusted earnings per share of 20 cents missed the anticipated 43 cents. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zoomd Technologies re-elected all board members at the annual meeting.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) (OTC: ZMDTF) along with its subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. shared the outcomes of their yearly and unique gathering. Zoomd, the online advertising management platform, disclosed the updates following the meeting.

news.headline: Vedanta's demerger proposal receives over 99% favorable votes from shareholders and creditors in Mumbai, India.
news.summary: In Mumbai, India, Vedanta's proposal for demerger receives overwhelming support from shareholders and creditors, with over 99% of votes in favor. This significant backing reflects strong endorsement for the company's strategic move.

news.headline: American Legion seeks entries for journalism awards, deadline March 15, 2025. Recognizing excellence in media.
news.summary: The American Legion in Indianapolis has officially opened submissions for the Fourth Estate Awards, celebrating outstanding journalism that contributes positively to society. The deadline for entries is March 15, 2025.

news.headline: French President Macron: We are entering a new era where there are risks, we will need to make choices.
Consensus Cloud Solutions (NASDAQ: CCSI) featuring AI solutions for healthcare interoperability at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas from March 3-6.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCSI), a top digital cloud fax and interoperability solutions provider, will showcase its offerings at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas, NV from March 3-6. Attendees can explore their innovative technology at booth #1361, discovering how Consensus aids healthcare organizations in managing unstructured data, attaining smooth interoperability, and enhancing operational efficiency. Moreover, Consensus will conduct informative customer and thought leadership panels during the event.

news.headline: Biena launches high-protein Crispy Edamame snack, surpassing nuts and eggs with protein content. #HealthySnacking
news.summary: Biena, a leading provider of healthy snacks and the top brand in Chickpea Snacks, is further solidifying its position in the market by introducing Biena Crispy Edamame, a high-protein snack option roasted in avocado oil. This expansion of their product line was announced on February 20, 2025, in Needham, Massachusetts. Known for their innovative approach to snacking, Biena continues to grow their product offerings to cater to the increasing demand for nutritious and satisfying snacks.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Any new tariffs will need a lot of study to understand their impact.
Lee Enterprises has partnered with Gary Vaynerchuk's VeeFriends to produce exclusive weekly comics for readers.
news.summary: Engaging and heartwarming comic strips are released weekly, offering a mix of humor, emotions, and thought-provoking content. These comics aim to evoke various feelings and keep readers entertained with each new installment.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: One time increase in tariffs is one-time increase in price levels.
Fed bids for 30-year tips total $907.1 mln.
GCU launches unique fundraising campaign to support community revitalization efforts, pioneering a five-point plan.
news.summary: Grand Canyon University in Phoenix announced a unique Five-Point Plan initiative, distinguishing it as the sole university nationally to implement such an approach. The university revealed its intention to kickstart a fundraising campaign, the first of its kind since its transition back to nonprofit status in 2018. The fundraising efforts are aimed at securing financial support for various initiatives.

news.headline: Baxter Q4 earnings beat expectations with EPS of 58 cents and sales of $2.75 billion, driven by strong performance in Medical Products & Therapies segment. Morgan Stanley maintains positive MedTech outlook.
news.summary: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) exceeded expectations in the fourth quarter of 2024, reporting an adjusted EPS of 58 cents, surpassing both management guidance of 50-53 cents and Wall Street's estimate of 52 cents. The medical device company also saw a 1% year-over-year increase in sales, totaling $2.75 billion (+2% on a constant currency basis), which outperformed the consensus of $2.67 billion. This strong top-line performance was primarily attributed to better-than-expected sales in the Medical Products & Therapies and Pharmaceuticals segments. Meanwhile, Morgan Stanley remains optimistic about the MedTech sector in 2024, upgrading Intuitive Surgical and Stryker while downgrading Nevro and Glaukos. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: Ukraine is ready for a security agreement with Trump.
BTC's market cools as capital inflows drop. Ethereum, Solana, and Memecoins also see corrections. Investor sentiment shifts.
news.summary: The market momentum of Bitcoin (BTC) is decreasing due to a weakening in capital inflows among various digital assets. Ethereum, Solana, and Memecoins are experiencing notable corrections as investor sentiment shifts. This trend highlights the changing dynamics within the digital asset market.

news.headline: Just Egg is now the most reliable egg as it fills gaps in the US supply chain. It is growing 5X faster than last year.
news.summary: Amid the Great American Egg Crisis causing widespread egg shortages in grocery stores and restaurants, Just Egg, a popular plant-based egg alternative, is playing a crucial role in addressing the gaps in the egg supply chain in the United States. With the outbreak of bird flu leading to increasing egg prices and limited availability, Just Egg has become a prominent option for the 94% of Americans who consume eggs daily. The demand for Just Egg has soared significantly, with the brand experiencing a growth rate that is five times faster this month compared to the same period last year.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: I had a productive meeting with the US Special Envoy to Ukraine Kellogg, we discussed effective security guarantees.
Entrepreneur Noah Beck becomes Co-Owner & Creative Director of Sown Again, reshaping essentials with quality.
news.summary: In a strategic move melding entrepreneurship and brand collaboration, a notable entrepreneur has joined forces with a renowned brand to revolutionize basics through superior artistry and enduring durability. Marking a significant development on February 20, 2025, in New York, Sown Again, the pioneer in minimalist apparel, joyfully announces the appointment of Noah Beck as Co-Owner and Creative Director. This partnership showcases the brand's commitment to innovation and unparalleled style, as they aim to enhance the blank clothing sector. Noah Beck, an acclaimed figure with a global following, brings his unique creative vision and expertise to this venture, promising to elevate the standards of the industry.

news.headline: Bitcoin down 6% in past month due to market fear of regulation; outperforming since early 2023. Scammers in panic mode.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a 6% decrease in value in the last month but is still in a macro bull market, surpassing other assets significantly since early 2023. Chart analyst Ali Martinez noted a pattern related to the SEC establishing a cyber and emerging technologies unit to tackle crypto fraud. Martinez believes the recent decline is due to market concerns about potential regulations, causing fear among scammers who are now in a state of panic.

news.headline: Holistic Moms Network joins KnoWEwell to continue mission; HMN active for 20+ years before partnership.
news.summary: In Bedminster, New Jersey, the Holistic Moms Network (HMN) has been promoting holistic living for over two decades, creating a nationwide community for families to connect and support each other. To adapt to changing circumstances, the HMN Board of Directors has chosen to dissolve the organization and collaborate with KnoWEwell, P.B.C. to sustain its mission. KnoWEwell, a global holistic well-being platform, will now take on the responsibility of continuing HMN's legacy.

news.headline: Former Janus Henderson analyst is accused of leading a work-from-home insider trading ring, per sources.
news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economic growth has been forecasted to increase by 6% in 2021, following a 3.5% decline in 2020 due to the pandemic. It is expected that the world GDP will reach $85.8 trillion this year. The economic recovery is uneven among countries, with advanced economies projected to grow by 5%, while emerging market and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.3%. However, the report warns of significant risks, including the possibility of new outbreaks and the uneven distribution of vaccines hindering the recovery process. It emphasizes the importance of international cooperation in ensuring a sustainable and inclusive economic recovery.

news.headline: Sean Hannity's interview with Trump and Musk on Fox News had 5.4M TV viewers, 20.5M video views on digital platforms.
news.summary: An interview featuring President Donald Trump and Elon Musk hosted by Sean Hannity received widespread attention, garnering over 20.5 million views on various digital platforms such as YouTube, TikTok, X, Instagram, and Facebook. The interview, which aired on Tuesday night, attracted 5.4 million viewers on television.

news.headline: BMO, LAFC, and ACFC release co-branded fan cards for offers & experiences, on Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: BMO, along with Los Angeles Football Club (LAFC) and Angel City Football Club (ACFC), have unveiled the BMO LAFC Debit Mastercard® and BMO Angel City FC Debit Mastercard® to offer fans unique gameday deals and experiences. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on February 20, 2025. This partnership aims to provide exclusive benefits to fans through these debit cards.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: It is important for productivity to attract global workers.
The Trump Administration opens a review into whether to rescind the $4 billion in grants awarded to the California high-speed rail project - Letter.
